message:
fix(connectors): use FcpError::RateLimited for 429 in openrouter and mistral

Both connectors returned FcpError::External for HTTP 429 responses, preventing
the FCP framework from applying rate-limit-specific backoff. Now returns
FcpError::RateLimited with parsed Retry-After header value. Also fixes
misleading status_code on JSON decode errors (was reporting HTTP 200).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
